style_rule: Clean splash impact with glossy droplets, compact crown spray, bright readable core, and soft fading residue. The effect should feel premium and battle-ready without turning into muddy surf or a travel beam.

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style water attacks. Show only a compact splash impact bloom with a glossy cyan-blue core, bright white highlights, and a crown of clean droplets. Make it readable in a battle overlay, side-on or front-on, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Keep the effect as a single isolated impact element, not a projectile. The shape should feel premium, crisp, and energetic.
assets.negative_prompt: no checkerboard, no black background, no surf wall, no muddy foam, no travel trail, no beam, no character, no arena, no UI, no logo

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style water attacks. Show only glossy droplets, short spray streaks, and a few bright specular highlights around a compact splash impact. Keep the silhouette clean and readable for game compositing. No character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame.
assets.negative_prompt: no checkerboard, no black background, no solid backdrop, no surf, no beam, no mist cloud that hides the droplets, no character, no arena, no UI

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style water attacks. Show a soft concentric ripple ring and a subtle splash residue halo with clean cyan-blue edges and a faint white core. Keep it compact, elegant, and easy to composite in a battle overlay. No character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame.
assets.negative_prompt: no checkerboard, no black background, no giant wave, no beam, no heavy foam, no character, no arena, no UI

assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style water attacks. Show a low-alpha mist residue with tiny fading droplets and soft aqua highlights after a splash impact. Keep the subject compact and subtle, with no travel path and no background. No character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame.
assets.negative_prompt: no checkerboard, no black background, no surf wall, no splash beam, no character, no arena, no UI
